positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic forest fox sitting peacefully within a dense grove of bioluminescent mushrooms and moss. The fox should have a clean silhouette and rich, deep russet and cream fur, contrasted against vibrant emerald greens, deep blues, and soft purples from the magical flora. Focus on high contrast and clean lines suitable for textile printing. Composition should be centered and balanced, utilizing dramatic subsurface scattering on the mushrooms and intricate detail in the leaf veins. Studio quality, maximalist nature illustration, gothic cottagecore aesthetic, symmetrical composition, clean vector look, vibrant color palette.
